      public abstract CommandUsage commandUsage()
      Required. Registers CommandUsage

    • register

      public abstract com.mojang.brigadier.builder.LiteralArgumentBuilder<CommandContext> register()
      Required. Register a command(String)

    • defaultEmbed

      public void defaultEmbed(Embed builder)
      Override to populate the embed builder after every non-throwing execution, including both success and error cases. Don't include sensitive info, there is no permission validation.

    • defaultHandler

      public void defaultHandler(CommandContext context)
      Called after every non-throwing execution, including both successes and error cases, overridable.

    • command

      public CaseInsensitiveLiteralArgumentBuilder<CommandContext> command(String literal)

    • redirect

      public com.mojang.brigadier.builder.LiteralArgumentBuilder<CommandContext> redirect(String literal, com.mojang.brigadier.tree.CommandNode<CommandContext> destination)
      Workaround for no-arg redirect nodes see https://github.com/Mojang/brigadier/issues/46 4 years and no official fix T.T
